description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and release, and a cache at path cache/ keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME-$CI_JOB_STAGE. In the test stage define five jobs (test:php70:typo3_8, test:php71:typo3_8, test:php72:typo3_8, test:php72:typo3_9, test:php72:typo3_master) that use the php:$DOCKER_TAG image, run a before_script that installs git via apk, downloads composer.phar with php -r 'copy("https://getcomposer.org/composer.phar", "composer.phar");', sets composer cache to /cache/composer, configures minimum‑stability ${COMPOSER_STABILITY}, requires ${TYPO3_VERSION} with dependencies and adds squizlabs/php_codesniffer as a dev requirement, then execute .Build/bin/phpcs --standard=PSR2 --ignore="Resources/Private/Php/*,public/*,.Build/*" --exclude="Generic.Files.LineLength" --extensions=php *; each job sets its own COMPOSER_STABILITY, DOCKER_TAG, NIMUT_TESTFRAMEWORK_VERSION and TYPO3_VERSION variables and runs only on branch pipelines. In the release stage add a ter-upload job using the webdevops/php image, limited to tag pipelines, with a before_script that downloads composer.phar and exports COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR=.cache/composer, then runs php composer.phar require namelesscoder/typo3-repository-client and, if CI_COMMIT_TAG, T3O_USERNAME and T3O_PASSWORD are present, resets and cleans the repository, extracts the tag message, and uploads the release to TER via .Build/bin/upload with the provided credentials and message.
